retrieved_result: Noted outdoorsman, conservationist Ham Biggar dies of cancer: Outdoor Notes "Hamilton Fisk ""Ham"" Biggar III spent many mornings fishing for steelhead trout in Conneaut Creek, which meanders past the rustic cabin of Biggar's Conneaut Creek Club. (Photo courtesy of Hamilton Fisk VI)By D'Arcy Egan, special to cleveland.com Email the author | Follow on Twitter on May 29, 2014
